no_changes_rationale:
No code changes required: ddx-861ad6a9 is already implemented and merged.

Evidence
--------
- Implementation commit: 6a005ea4 "test(bead): add 4 CI guards for state-machine drift prevention [ddx-861ad6a9]"
  Reachable from current HEAD (0e47f9ac, the pre-execute-bead checkpoint), via merge 0ca93d0a.
- Files in tree (all tracked under HEAD):
    cli/internal/bead/sync_test.go
    cli/internal/bead/testdata/bd_export_with_labels_events.jsonl
    cli/internal/bead/types.go (CanonicalStatuses)
    cli/internal/bead/schema/bead-record.schema.json
    docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-031-bead-state-machine.md

Acceptance verification
-----------------------
1. Four named guard tests exist in cli/internal/bead/sync_test.go:
     - TestSchemaEnumMatchesCanonicalStatuses
     - TestStatusLiteralAudit
     - TestTDDocMatchesSchemaEnum
     - TestSchemaCompatRoundTripPreservesLabelsAndEvents
2. Each uses t.Fatalf/t.Errorf with a message naming the file paths and the
   specific drift, so a developer who breaks one is pointed at the exact
   location to fix. (The original commit message records that drift
   detection was verified by deliberately breaking each guard.)
3. Run-time check just performed in this worktree:
     cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/ -run '<all four>' -v -count=1
   Result: all four PASS in 1.31s total — well under the 5s budget.
4. The tests are plain Go tests under the standard package path; the CI
   workflow's `go test ./...` invocation picks them up with no opt-in flag.
5. The guards' purposes are explained in the file-level comment block at
   the top of sync_test.go (lines 3-28), one paragraph per guard.

Note on the bead's REVIEW:BLOCK
-------------------------------
The bead notes report "Diff contains only an execution result.json
artifact; no test files were added." That observation applied to an
earlier attempt; the implementation in commit 6a005ea4 (already merged)
adds the test files and they are present and passing in this worktree.
Re-running the four guards in this attempt confirms green status; no
further action is required.
